scripts.smoke: node src/md-to-pdf.js whitelabel examples/minimal.md --no-pdf --html dist/smoke-whitelabel.html && node src/md-to-pdf.js blacklabel examples/minimal.md --no-pdf --html dist/smoke-blacklabel.html
scripts.test:pdf: node src/md-to-pdf.js whitelabel examples/minimal.md --html dist/test-whitelabel.html -o dist/test-whitelabel.pdf && node src/md-to-pdf.js blacklabel examples/minimal.md --html dist/test-blacklabel.html -o dist/test-blacklabel.pdf
